general.name: Jamf Connect Menu - TheBay
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>977A31E2-1C7B-48C0-84E8-43D78521A468</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>The Bay</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>781DAAA9-2EC1-442A-952E-2313E03E8D33</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Connect Menu - TheBay</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Connect Menu - TheBay</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Connect Menu - TheBay</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>The Bay</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>781DAAA9-2EC1-442A-952E-2313E03E8D33</string><key>Keychain</key><dict><key>InternetItems</key><dict/><key>PasswordItems</key><dict/></dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>9FA0624A-168C-4BD2-82CE-DD704258D156</string><key>Appearance</key><dict><key>AlternateBranding</key><false/></dict><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.jamf.connect</string><key>HiddenMenuItems</key><array><string>preferences</string><string>quit</string></array><key>WebBrowser</key><dict><key>BrowserSelection</key><string>Google Chrome</string></dict><key>SignIn</key><dict><key>WindowTitle</key><string>Sign In</string><key>AutoAuthenticate</key><true/><key>SignInLogo</key><string>/usr/local/jamfconnect/thebayjclogo.png</string><key>UsernameLabel</key><string>Email Address</string></dict><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PasswordPolicies</key><dict><key>ExpirationManualOverrideDays</key><integer>90</integer><key>ExpirationNotificationStartDay</key><integer>5</integer><key>SyncPasswordsMessage</key><string>Your computer and Microsoft passwords do not match. Please verify the computer password so that the Microsoft password can be applied to your account</string><key>NetworkCheck</key><integer>15</integer><key>ExpirationCountdownStartDay</key><integer>15</integer><key>CheckOnNetworkChange</key><true/></dict><key>IdPSettings</key><dict><key>TenantID</key><string>ef6f731e-41f8-43bd-9df6-8982a75c2f24</string><key>ROPGID</key><string>d6248be3-a81c-4a12-b8b3-ca959a44ae66</string><key>Provider</key><string>Azure</string></dict><key>UserHelp</key><dict><key>HelpOptions</key><string>https://hbc.cherwellondemand.com/CherwellPortal/</string><key>HelpType</key><string>URL</string></dict><key>CustomMenuItems</key><dict><key>gethelp</key><string>Cherwell Support</string></dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Connect Menu - TheBay</string></dict></array></dict></plist>

computer_group.name: HBC ABM - The Bay Enrolled PreStage
